name: Maze!
short_description: Maze! is a top-down 2D indie game featuring minimalist visuals and procedurally generated mazes. Choose from four different algorithms, customize maze sizes to your liking, and race against time for high scores.
detailed_description:
Maze! is a 2D, top-down game designed for casual puzzle enthusiasts! Immerse yourself in an experience that combines a simplistic, minimalist visual style with complex challenges.

It is a single-player experience through procedurally generated mazes, offering an endless array of levels to conquer. With four distinct maze algorithms to choose from, every level presents a unique and intriguing challenge, ensuring no two experiences are ever alike.

Delve into Maze! and embrace this world of intricate pathways and strategic thinking. Whether you're a casual player seeking a laid-back challenge or a logic-loving enthusiast craving complex puzzles, this indie game promises a unique experience.
